g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the customer submit in a start service request?')
sendPrompt('What confirmation does the customer get?')
sendPrompt('What happens when the service goes live?')
sendPrompt('How does the system validate KYC?')
sendPrompt('How does duplicate service detection work?')
sendPrompt('How is a field agent assigned?')
sendPrompt('What does the field technician do?')
sendPrompt('How is the service activation recorded?')
sendPrompt('What notification is sent to the customer?')
